utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items. Each item is fully detailed: health_coverage specifies physical and mental health coverage with costs and limits; property_coverage specifies home/contents aspects with costs; travel_coverage specifies international travel protection with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs (included); and total_budget gives a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main components: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health coverage, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for property coverage, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel coverage. From the ground-truth data, the ratings are as follows: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical_health) has a rating of 8, LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental_health) also has a rating of 8, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property_protection) has a rating of 8, and LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel_insurance) has a rating of 7. Since the final plan includes both physical and mental health under the same LifeFirst Standard Plan, both ratings (8 each) are relevant. Additional services like telemedicine, wellness programs, and multilingual assistance are included features but not explicitly rated as primary plans, so we focus on the main insurance plan ratings.
